Job Title: SAP BTP AI Consultant

Company: ABC Technologies Pvt. Ltd.

Location: Bangalore, India

Experience:
0–2 Years

Employment Type:
Full-Time

------------------------------------------------------------
JOB SUMMARY
------------------------------------------------------------

We are looking for a motivated SAP BTP AI Consultant to design and develop
AI-powered business solutions using SAP Business Technology Platform.
The ideal candidate should have a strong understanding of Generative AI,
Python programming, SAP BTP services, LangChain, LangGraph, and cloud-based
application development.

------------------------------------------------------------
RESPONSIBILITIES
------------------------------------------------------------

- Develop AI-powered enterprise applications.
- Build Generative AI solutions using Gemini or OpenAI models.
- Design Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines.
- Develop intelligent AI Agents using LangGraph.
- Integrate SAP HANA Cloud with AI applications.
- Create REST APIs using Python.
- Work with vector databases and embeddings.
- Perform prompt engineering for enterprise AI applications.
- Collaborate with functional and technical teams.
- Participate in Agile software development.

------------------------------------------------------------
REQUIRED SKILLS
------------------------------------------------------------

Programming
- Python
- SQL

SAP Technologies
- SAP BTP
- SAP HANA Cloud

Generative AI
- LangChain
- LangGraph
- Prompt Engineering
- RAG
- Embeddings
- Vector Database
- Gemini API

Machine Learning
- TensorFlow
- Scikit-Learn

Cloud
- REST API
- Git
- GitHub

------------------------------------------------------------
PREFERRED SKILLS
------------------------------------------------------------

- Docker
- Kubernetes
- FastAPI
- CI/CD
- Linux
- Problem Solving
- Communication Skills

------------------------------------------------------------
EDUCATION
------------------------------------------------------------

Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science,
Information Technology,
or related field.

------------------------------------------------------------

The ideal candidate should have strong programming skills, database knowledge,
cloud fundamentals, and an understanding of modern data engineering tools.

- Build ETL/ELT workflows for structured and unstructured data.

- Perform data cleaning, preprocessing, and validation.
- Work with cloud-based data platforms.
- Support machine learning teams by preparing datasets.
- Monitor and optimize database performance.
- Collaborate with software developers, analysts, and data scientists.
- Follow Agile software development practices.

Job Title: SAP ABAP Developer

Company: Enterprise SAP Solutions Pvt. Ltd.

Location: Chennai, India

Experience:
0–2 Years

Employment Type:
Full-Time

------------------------------------------------------------
JOB SUMMARY
------------------------------------------------------------

We are seeking a motivated SAP ABAP Developer to design, develop, test, and
maintain SAP applications. The ideal candidate should have knowledge of ABAP
programming, SAP S/4HANA concepts, database programming, and integration with
SAP Business Technology Platform.

------------------------------------------------------------
RESPONSIBILITIES
------------------------------------------------------------

- Develop and maintain SAP ABAP programs.
- Create Reports, Module Pool Programs, Smart Forms, and Adobe Forms.
- Develop enhancements using User Exits, BAdIs, and Enhancement Framework.
- Build interfaces using BAPI, RFC, IDoc, and OData services.
- Write optimized SQL queries and database procedures.
- Work with SAP HANA database.
- Debug and optimize existing ABAP programs.
- Collaborate with functional consultants and business users.
- Participate in testing, deployment, and production support.
- Follow Agile software development practices.

Programming
